name: Dixit Chauhan
summary: Full-Stack Developer with 8+ years of experience building scalable, high-performance web applications using React.js, Node.js, PHP (Laravel/CodeIgniter), and MySQL/MongoDB. Experienced in building scalable APIs, microservices, and cloud-based applications with a focus on performance and reliability.

skills.Backend: Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs, PHP, Laravel, CodeIgniter, Magento1

points: Built and integrated Node.js APIs, improving modular architecture.
Implemented JWT-based authentication and REST APIs for secure and scalable services.
Developed full-stack applications using PHP, React.js, Node.js, and MySQL.
Led development of Darveys luxury e-commerce platform managing a team of 5 developers.
Improved performance and scalability of high-traffic applications.

projects.name: GeM - Government e Marketplace
points: Developed and enhanced the frontend application using React.js.
Designed and integrated Node.js-based REST APIs to support frontend modules and improve system modularity.

projects.name: Darveys.com
projects.stack: React JS, PHP (Laravel, CodeIgniter, and Magento1), MySQL
points: Led a team of 5 developers to deliver a high-performing e-commerce platform.
Developed the frontend from scratch using ReactJS, ensuring a responsive and engaging user experience.
Customized and optimized Magento1 backend for faster performance and seamless scalability.
Implemented a custom product filter and catalog positioning module, enhancing product discovery and customer journey.

education: B.Tech, Indian Institute of Information Technology Kota, 2017 | CGPA: 8
achievements: Contributed to large-scale cloud migration project at TCS.
"Pat on the Back" award at Velocity Software Solutions for outstanding performance in the Darveys project.
